title: Per-spec stop-conditions catalog
description: A spec's deterministic stop-condition catalog. It inherits the universal U-* conditions from rules/stop-conditions-catalog.md and adds project (P-*) and spec (S-*) entries. Lives at projects/<project>/specs/<spec>/stop-conditions.json. Each entry is an observable trigger with the exact STOP[...] text to surface and the gate that must be met to resume.

inheritsUniversal.description: Whether the universal U-* conditions apply. Should be true; a spec cannot silently weaken the universal catalog.

conditions.description: Project (P-*) and spec (S-*) additions. Universal U-* conditions are inherited, not redeclared here.

id.description: P-* for recurring project failure modes, S-* for feature-local hazards.

trigger.description: A deterministic, observable signal — not a feeling of uncertainty.

surfacedAs.description: The exact text to write when it fires, e.g. 'STOP[P-1]: <message>.'

resolutionGate.description: The artifact, command result, decision, or file state required to resume.
